summary: Tested Client Internal Reference Token System. Backend: 14/14 tests passed - GET/POST /api/referencia/{token} endpoints work correctly with valid/invalid/used/expired tokens. Frontend: Public reference page loads correctly, shows FS info, accepts input, submits successfully, and displays appropriate error states (410 for used, 404 for invalid). Admin NotificationBell shows referencia_interna notifications with correct styling.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All public reference page features verified

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_* tokens during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Internal Reference Token System is fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/referencia/{token} (public, no auth required). Token structure in MongoDB collection 'reference_tokens': {id, token, relatorio_id, cliente_id, used, referencia, expires_at, created_at}. Frontend route: /reference/:token renders PublicReferencePage.jsx. NotificationBell.jsx handles 'referencia_interna' notification type with indigo styling. Auto-email trigger in create_relatorio when client has incluir_referencia_interna=true and email set.

tests: GET /api/referencia/{token} with valid token returns FS data (numero_assistencia, cliente_nome, local_intervencao, data_servico, equipamento, expires_at)
POST /api/referencia/{token} successfully submits reference and marks token as used
POST /api/referencia/{token} creates admin notification with type='referencia_interna'

verified: Page loads with valid token showing FS info (numero_assistencia, cliente, local, data, equipamento)
Reference input field present with data-testid='ref-input'
Submit button disabled when input empty, enabled when filled
Submission shows success screen with submitted reference
Used token shows 'Referencia Ja Submetida' error (410)
Notifications display with correct title 'Referência Interna Inserida'
Notifications show client name and reference value in message
